checks.finding: All 9 tasks' Risk tiers match their scope surfaces per risk-classification-policy.md (high for quality-gate-input/security-chokepoint surfaces; medium for recoverable installer/CI config writes; low for docs-only). No under- or over-classification found.
All 6 Risk: high tasks carry both Red->Green evidence and independent-review-verdict-recorded Done When items. No critical-tier task exists, so second-approver/signed-bundle does not apply.

T-003 Scope spans 5 distinct parser implementation areas in one task (agents-md, review-ticket, quality-report, evidence, traceability parsers), each parsing a structurally different input format with its own cannot-parse fixture set. This exceeds the more-than-three-implementation-areas threshold, risking a task that cannot be completed and verified in a single focused session. All other 8 tasks stay within 3 areas and at or under 8 Done-When items; no fragmentation pattern found.

Every functional task maps to an AC with explicit error-path scenarios (AC-003/004/017 for T-001; AC-002 for T-002; cannot-parse fixtures for T-003; AC-017 not-found for T-004; AC-012 cannot-determine for T-009; AC-014 missing/mismatch for T-005). No happy-path-only task found.

All 17 test-type declarations align with their scope: unit tests target single module boundaries, integration tests involve 2+ components, TEST-005 is correctly e2e over the real stdio transport. No contradiction.

All 9 tasks carry an explicit Rollback: field. All high-risk tasks specify commit-revert with no-blast-radius reasoning; T-004/T-009/T-005 additionally reference uninstall.sh for deployed environments; T-006 references uninstall for de-registration recovery; T-007 references workflow-commit revert.

No uncoordinated file-purpose overlap. The T-004 stub / T-009 replace of get_next_sdd_command is the legitimate create-then-replace pattern enforced by T-009's Blockers: T-004. T-001 build config vs T-007 dist commit serve distinct purposes with correct ordering.

Blockers DAG cross-checked against scope dependencies; all 15 edges are genuine (parsers consumed by server tools; stub replacement; packaging after functional completion; docs after flag finalization). No missing blockers identified; T-002/T-003 correctly independent.
SKIP: no bugfix or debugging task in scope. All 9 tasks are net-new feature implementation tasks.
